content.text:
Course:
University Work 2 (UW2) — Semester 2, Unit UM2, Credits: 2, Coeff: 2
Course Objectives
Ability to communicate smoothly.
Ability to work in a team and associatively.
Course Content
Part 1: Learning and Organizing the Educational Environment
The concept of learning and its methods
Self-learning skills
Time organization and management skills
Skills for organizing the student's educational space
Part 2: Pedagogical Accompaniment
What is pedagogical accompaniment
Pedagogical and personal objectives of accompaniment
Online pedagogical accompaniment
Part 3: Prevention of Social Ills: Drugs, Suicide, etc.
The concept of social problems
Types of social problems: smoking, drugs, suicide, etc.
Health, psychological and social effects of social problems
Teaching Mode
Elearning (80%), Face to face mode (20%)
Assessment Mode
Exam (100%)
Recommended Textbooks
ROBERTS, Andrew. The thinking student guide to college. Chicago: University Chicago Press, 2010.
MINISTERE DE L’ENSEIGNEMENT SUPERIEUR ET DE LA RECHERCHE SCIENTIFIQUE. Guide pratique de mise en œuvre et de suivi du LMD. Alger : MESRS, 2011.
BARKLEY, Elizabeth F. Student engagement techniques: a handbook for a college faculty. USA: Jossey-Bass, 2010.
O’SHEA, Sarah [et al]. First in family students, university experience and family life. Australia: Mc-Milan, 2017.
